headline: Mike Khouw's Microsoft Trade, Going Into Earnings

headline: Carter Worth And Mike Khouw Think Apple Is Headed Higher
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Carter Worth of Cornerstone Macro spoke about a bullish technical set up in Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL).

headline: Cramer Gives His Opinion On Cardiff Oncology, Lemonade And More
summary: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said Cardiff Oncology Inc (NASDAQ: CRDF) is "just okay." He thinks it is a very speculative situation.

headline: Here's How Much Investing $1,000 In Intel Stock 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Investors who have owned stocks since 2016 generally have experienced some big gains. In fact, the SPDR S&P 500 (NYSE: SPY) total return in the past five years is 120.4%. But there is no question some big-name stocks performed better than others along the way.

headline: Are You Ready For The 'FANGMAN'? — What To Know About The New Acronym On The Block
summary: After the FANGs, FAANGs and MAGAs, another acronym taking the investment world by storm is FANGMAN. This acronym is used by traders to refer to stocks of seven of the biggest tech companies in the world.

summary: Dave Portnoy's The Barstool Fund is getting a boost from a Michigan cannabis product company.

headline: Will Jumia, Africa's Anwer to Amazon And Alibaba, Reach $75 By 2022?
summary: Every week, Benzinga conducts a sentiment survey to find out what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.

headline: Uber Lays Off More Than 180 Postmates Employees, Including CEO Bastian Lehmann
summary: Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE: UBER) on Thursday laid off roughly 185 people from its Postmates division, the New York Times has reported.

headline: Stock Wars: Coca-Cola Vs. Pepsi
summary: Comb through the annual reports of Coca-Cola and Pepsi, and you will see the two rivals list one another as their main competition. White both are giants in the beverage field, there is one key difference, which could be the reason to pick one over the other.
